source: Delimitation Commission Order, 2008. Stable since first applied in the 2011 election; unchanged through 2016, 2021, and 2026 elections. Next change requires a new delimitation (expected after the post-2026 census).
verified: Cross-checked against Wikipedia 'List of constituencies of the Kerala Legislative Assembly', Wikipedia per-constituency pages, and IndiaTVNews 2026 coverage. All four cycles in our dataset (2011, 2016, 2021, 2026) use the same 16 reserved seats.
